sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12278" key="a)po/blemma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-βλεμμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n12278.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">steadfast gaze,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:75" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">75</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
